name: automated-code-reviewer-root
description: Unified root monorepo settings for Automated Code Reviewer

scripts.build: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build && cd .. && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.cpSync('frontend/dist', 'dist', { recursive: true });"
scripts.vercel-build: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build && cd .. && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.cpSync('frontend/dist', 'dist', { recursive: true });"
